name: Unregister-PSResourceRepository

options.name: -Name
options.description: The name of one or more repositories to remove.

options.name: -PassThru
options.description: When specified, outputs a PSRepositoryInfo object for each repository that's removed.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet isn't run.

args.name: -Name
args.description: The name of one or more repositories to remove.

description: Removes a registered repository from the local machine.
